app.title: Browser conversion workspace
app.subtitle: LibreSVIP now runs as a React PWA and delegates conversion work to a Pyodide module worker.

runtime.platform_limits_body: The PWA can read files that you choose or drop into the page. It cannot access arbitrary local paths, output folders, or system reveal actions.
runtime.download_only: Converted files are returned as browser downloads.

converter.dropzone_placeholder: Choose files or drop them here. Unsupported files are skipped unless you select an input format manually.
converter.unsupported_file: {{name}} is not supported. Select an input format before adding this file.
converter.directories_not_supported: Folders cannot be imported in the browser. Drop files instead.
converter.no_options: This plugin does not expose configurable options.
